title: Bihar BPSC 72nd CCE Pre Online Form 2026
post_name: Bihar BPSC Integrated 72nd Combined (Preliminary) Competitive Exam 2026 Recruitment 2026 Apply Online for 1230 Post
fee_payment_method: Pay the Exam Fee Through Online / Offline Fee Mode Only
age_relaxation_notes: Age Relaxation Extra as per BPSC 72 Pre Examination Rules.
how_to_apply: Bihar Public Service Commission BPSC Are Issued 72nd CCE Combined (Preliminary) Competitive Examination 2026. Notification and Invited Online Application Form for the BPSC 72nd CCE Recruitment 2026 Candidate Can Apply Online for 07/05/2026 to 31/05/2026.
Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the BPSC Latest Recruitment 2026 Application Form in Sarkari Result Recruitment Latest Job Section.
Kindly Check and Collect the All Document - Hand Writing, Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details.
Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form - Photo, Sign, ID, Thumb, Proof, Etc.
Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully.
If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed.
Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
For the latest updates on Sarkari Result, admit card, answer key, and result, always visit SarkariResult.com, the official website for Sarkari Result in India (Since 2012).
